fields.title: Recipe website
fields.short_description: A Django web application where users can submit recipes and view recipes shared by others. All recipes must be approved by an admin before becoming public.
fields.description:
Welcome to a vibrant community built for food lovers, home cooks, and culinary explorers. Our recipe platform is designed to make discovering and sharing delicious meals simple, engaging, and trustworthy.

Whether you're looking for inspiration for your next meal or eager to share your own culinary creations, this platform brings together passionate cooks from everywhere in one place.
